Run Linter for a DockerFile:
name: Hadolint
on:
push:
    branches: [ "main" ]
pull_request:
    branches: [ "main" ]

jobs:
lint_dockerfiles:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - uses: hadolint/hadolint-action@v3.1.0
        with:
        dockerfile: ./examples/go_app_example/Dockerfile.goapp
